response.overview: Jung-Hyun Hwang is a lecturer at the Tourism Management College in the capital. He is a Korean who is fluent in Malay. He is handsome and admired by many students on campus, but he is only interested in a Malay student named Sara. When Sara is assigned to do a project about Korea, Hyun insists on helping her so they can spend time together. Sara initially rejects him but falls in love with him as they walk around campus. However, the relationship between a student and a lecturer will not run smoothly. Eventually, Hyun converts to Islam and takes on a new name, Daniel Abdullah. He will begin a new journey with Sara. However, he must first overcome two challenges, namely fasting and circumcision.
response.title: Lecturerku Oppa
